title: Bahman Sadeghi
text: Meet Baaman, a software developer with a passion for exploring new cultures , languages and foods. With experience living in the USA, Portugal ,Bahman has a love for travel and immersing himself in different ways of life. In his free time, you can find him delving into novels, watching captivating TV shows, and expanding his knowledge of deep learning. As a minimalist and follower of Stoic principles, bahman approaches both his personal and professional life with intention and purpose.This bio was written with the help of ChatGPT.
